name: World Gold Trust
business: World Gold Trust (GLDM) issues shares that reflect the performance of the price of gold bullion, less its expenses, providing institutional and retail investors with indirect access to the gold bullion market. The trust holds only gold bullion and does not invest in other assets.
namedSuppliers: The Bank of New York Mellon
WGC USA Asset Management Company, LLC
State Street Global Advisors Funds Distributors, LLC
